caption: A man with a beard is seated at a dark table in a studio setting, wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed on the chest, a white baseball cap, and headphones. He has a gold chain around his neck and a gold watch on his left wrist. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black container with a label that reads "THE TALK OUT." Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a recurring logo with five stars and the text "UNION HUSTLE." Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a portion of a logo saying "KHL" is visible. As the scene progresses, the man remains seated, speaking and shifting his gaze slightly while gesturing with his hands on the table. The camera angle and the arrangement of the equipment remain static throughout the sequence.
